title: Server manifest (bench.json)
description: Per-server manifest next to each Dockerfile — the roster's single source of truth (PLAN §7.4).

port.description: Canonical container port the server listens on inside its image — 8080 for every server (PLAN §6 rule 1). The benchmark client (testcontainers) maps it to a dynamic host port; the contract harness maps it 1:1.

web.description: Whether this server implements the web suite (GET /html, /jwt/sign, /jwt/verify, POST /validate, GET /compute). When false, the contract harness loads but skips the web suite for this server (scripts/contract.mts passes --skip-suite=web).

dev_port.description: Local-dev host port (PLAN §6 `2LRFF` = 20000 + L×1000 + R×100 + FF) this server binds on localhost when run outside a container (`just dev`). Distinct per server; never collides with another repo's stack.
